---
title: "Introduction to RStudio"
source: "Tutorial Material"
author: "Stephanie Brockmann"
institution: "Baker University"
competency: [Programming Skills, Data Wrangling]
tech-lang: [R]
main-format: "PPT Slide, Data, Code, MSWord"
toc: true
toc-title: "On this page"
---

## Material Description

Learning RStudio - A Basic Introduction to Operations and Use. 

## Module Materials

You can access the material [here](https://github.com/KansasData/Module/tree/main/Baker_Brockman_RStudio_Intro)

This Material is under the [CC BY-SA license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/deed.en)
